product_surfaces: internal/mcp/mcp.go: RPCHandler.Handle stateless JSON-RPC dispatch for HTTP/SSE transport
internal/mcp/mcp.go: Server stdio JSON-RPC transport with newline-delimited framing
internal/mcp/transport_http_sse.go: ClientSession enqueue/close for per-session response channels
internal/mcp/transport_http_sse.go: requestID extraction/generation and X-Request-ID response header
internal/mcp/transport_http_sse.go: writeTransportError structured error with correlation logging
cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go: runMCPServe dispatch to runMCPStdio or runMCPHTTPSSE
cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go: runMCPHTTPSSE readiness probe checking repo availability and lock contention
internal/mcp/mcp_test.go: HTTP/SSE test helpers (openSSE, postJSON, readSSEMessage, postRaw)
internal/service/service.go: Service factory implementing serviceInterface for cache-first reads
evidence_type: offline Go unit/integration tests exercising production transport handlers, session registry, and error paths, plus CLI-built binary exercising real stdio MCP entrypoint against a populated cache
freshness: current working tree Go packages and compiled binary from cmd/gitcode-mcp; tests use in-memory SQLite stores with sanitized fixture issue/wiki cache records; live validation disabled
mocks_used: external dependencies only: live GitCode API sync is substituted with deterministic in-memory SQLite cache stores populated with sanitized fixture records because live validation is disabled
